entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.4.0
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.4.0 [Beta]
The UT and Skill Update.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.
Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.4.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.4.0).
## New
- Universal Tracker Glitched Logic support. In the context of this game, glitched logic remove sustain and battle logic. - Universal Tracker yaml-less support - Merged the option `remove_skills_requirements` with the new option. - Added the new option `skill_requirement_shuffle`. It has the following values: - **Vanilla:** Vanilla Requirements. Nothing is changed. - **Remove:** Removes the skills requirement from the game. This mean that every skill are learnable by themselves from level 1 (if unlocked). - **Level Shuffle:** The required skills are kept the same, but the level requirement are randomized. - **Non-Root Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees. - **Non-Root Shuffle:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees. - **Full Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees. - **Full Shuffle:** All skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees.** - **Chaos:** All skills requirements are randomized. Mastery are not prioritized as primary requirement. No chain dependency limit.
## Fixes
- Automatic Quest Reward Scouting crashing the client under specific circumstances - Improved reliability for Clear Key and Violet Key special flag handling.
## Misc
- Major Logic Engine refactoring. This fixed most potential generation problems, and improved generation performances.

entry.title: Crash Team Racing v0.1.0
entry.content:
## CTR-AP v0.1.0 - first public release
CTR-AP is an Archipelago integration for a native PC port of Crash Team Racing (PlayStation, 1999). It lets Crash Team Racing take part in an Archipelago multiworld: trophies, relics, tokens, gems, and boss wins become checks, and the items you need to progress arrive from the multiworld.
📖 **New here? Follow the [setup guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md).**
The default seed gives you the full experience: randomized warp-pad requirements with destination shuffle, the Gems hidden in the multiworld, Gem Cups and Battle Arenas included, and a sprinkle of trap items.
### Bring your own disc
This release ships no game data. You provide the game files from your own copy of the NTSC-U (North American) Crash Team Racing disc. Nothing here contains Crash Team Racing game assets, and none are distributed.
Easiest setup: name a raw `.bin` dump of your disc `ctr-u.bin` and place it in an `assets` folder next to the executable. Alternatively, the bundled `extract_assets.py` reads your disc image (`.cue`, `.bin`, or `.chd`), verifies the region, and copies out just the files the game needs, which saves disk space. See the [setup guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md) for the full walkthrough.
### What is in this release
- `ctr_native_ap.exe`: the game executable with Archipelago support built in. - `ctr.apworld`: the Archipelago world, for whoever generates the multiworld. - `extract_assets.py`: the optional space-saving asset extractor. - `ap-config.example.txt`: a documented template for your server settings (optional; the in-game OPTIONS → Connection screen is the recommended way). - `SETUP.md`: step-by-step setup (the [living guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md), or [as shipped with this release](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/v0.1.0/SETUP.md)).
The `ctr.apworld` is also attached separately for multiworld hosts who only need the world file.
### Known limitations
- NTSC-U (North American) discs only. PAL and Japanese discs are detected and refused. Other regions may be supported later. - The disc image must be a raw MODE2/2352 dump (a `.cue`/`.bin`, a raw `.bin`, or a `.chd`). A cooked 2048-byte `.iso` does not carry the audio and video sector data the game needs. - `.chd` images require the `chdman` tool to be installed and on your PATH. - After beating your goal, the game may freeze on a black screen once the credits end. Your goal is already sent to the multiworld at that point - close the game and relaunch. A relaunch shows your completed seed correctly. - Windows only for now; a Linux/Steam Deck build is on the roadmap.
### What's next
v0.1.0 is the beginning, not the finish line. On the roadmap - no dates promised, hobby project honesty applies:
**Planned next:** live position checks (earn a check for *reaching* 1st mid-race, including inside Gem Cups) as the foundation for progressive boost and character-stat item packs · splitting the Oxide's Final Challenge relic requirement into Gold and Platinum tiers · per-seed AI difficulty · a proper Ultimate Sacred Fire trap tier with the blue flame, plus more trap types · received Wumpa Fruit actually giving you fruit · enforced relic-race minimum-time and all-boxes options · skippable podium cutscenes · per-track boss garage unlocks · Steam Deck/Linux · DeathLink.
**Exploring:** custom community tracks in the randomizer pool · a solo/offline mode · boss shuffle.
**Long-term:** Arcade Cups and Time Trial ghosts as checks, character unlocks as multiworld rewards, Mirror/N-Verted/Retro-Fueled seed modifiers, music shuffle, and a Shortcut Unlock item.
Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue.
### Verify your download
`ctr-archipelago-v0.1.0-windows-x86.zip` SHA-256: `2174191a475565145ba8401ef2469df0d066ef815dd92eb565a07e1f8de4332f`
### Credits
- The CTR-tools [CTR-ModSDK](https://github.com/CTR-tools/CTR-ModSDK) decompilation project, which this port is built on. - Reverse engineering and Archipelago work by Icebound777 and Taor - the [randomizer design](https://github.com/icebound777/CTR-Randomizer-Standalone) this project carries forward. - [PsyCross](https://github.com/OpenDriver2/PsyCross), for PlayStation hardware-abstraction code that parts of the native platform layer are derived from. - [thecodingbob](https://github.com/thecodingbob/ctr-native), whose in-game config menu framework this fork's options menu is ported from. - [SDL3](https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL), for cross-platform windowing, input, timing, and audio. - [apclientpp](https://github.com/black-sliver/apclientpp), the Archipelago client library powering the in-process connection. - Crash Team Racing is a trademark of its respective rights holders. This is an unofficial, fan-made project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by them.
### AI disclosure
Parts of this project were developed with AI assistance. See the [AI disclosure in the repository README](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap#ai-usage-disclosure) for the honest, detailed version.

entry.title: NSMBW v0.2.2
entry.content:
# New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.2 ## Features - Deathlink amnesty - New option for hintmovie logic - Logo in launcher - Option to use xdotool instead of root access for Linux - More debug comands
## Bug fixes - Logic: Spin jump logic, 5-1 climb, etc - One of the issues with connecting - Grouped deathlink

entry.title: Hades v0.16.2
entry.content:
Various bugfixes and logic fixes.
Thanks to @ColgateSupreme

entry.title: Brutal Orchestra v1.0.0r3
entry.content: Now you recieve heroes and money properly

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v0.5.4
entry.content: Relatively well-tested release from mid-late June. new stuff: - "alternates" for logic - buncha logic fixes - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - Tracker tab in Client if UT is installed - new ramp in hayters folly

entry.title: Anno 1800 v1.3.1
entry.content:
Just a quick bugfix release to make Universal Tracker work with Anno 1800 again.
### Changes * Fixed Universal Tracker breaking when progressive items are enabled * Fixed duplicate starting items if multiple instances of Anno 1800 are in the same multiworld * Added section on how to make money to the main game page
This release is compatible with multiworlds from v1.3.0 onwards.
### [Game Page](<https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/en_Anno%201800.md>) | [Setup](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/setup_en.md) | [Items](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/items_en.md) | [Locations](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/locations_en.md) | [Roadmap](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.1/worlds/a1800/docs/roadmap_en.md)
Find the apworld and a several template yamls below.

entry.title: Zelda's Adventure GDX v0.1.0r5
entry.content: ## What's Changed * Feature: stylized archipelago pickup sprite courtesy of Spectremint by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/95 * Feature: Clean up archipelago config screen and add password field by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/100 * Fix: Make Llort reward 250 rubies on defeat by @sshrrutiiii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 ## New Contributors * @sshrrutiiii made their first contribution in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.2

entry.title: System Shock 2 v0.5.1
entry.content:
Fixed Art Code softlock. Changed Psi pull to progression. Rebalanced elite perk weights(chances for a perk to be selected)
It is ok to update both the mod and the ap world mid-run from 0.5.0, and you should not need to remake your yaml from 0.5.0

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.24.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * chore(release): v0.23.0 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/165 * fix(setup): Linux patcher-python + Ryujinx detection by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/166 * Scale logic base HP with energy_per_tank (fix fixed-99 damage model) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/167
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.23.0...v0.24.0

entry.title: FF1 Pixel Remaster v0.6.0r2r2
entry.content: - Fix the AP Canoe script triggering near the Ship.

entry.title: Mario is Missing v0.0.3
entry.content:
Release just allows those to do the double clicky on patch files that they have become accustomed to, courtesy of @zephyyrr
No more manual patching!
Don't forget you can now use this apworld in conjunction with the DKC2 Trivia apworld, if you want to take advantage of their database of questions then be sure to install that apworld and turn on community questions in your yaml.
Happy gaming!

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.6
entry.content:
## New Features * "Priority" option added for tasks to be in priority locations * Added "prev" and "sequential" keywords to task pre-reqs. "prev" will establish a requirement on the previous task in sequence. "sequential" can be used in tasks where count > 1 in order to make each task in the duplicates sequential dependent (i.e. second task in duplicate depends on completing the first, third on second, fourth on third, etc.) * Task location names now display in non-taskipelago clients
## Bug Fixes * Fixed a bug with the way goal state is detected * Added a check to prevent yaml generation when the yaml would have no location available at multiworld start to prevent location starvation * Fixed another filler generation bug * General clean-up
## Known Issues * Universal Tracker is unhappy with the structure of the datapackage because of the dynamic nature of Taskipelago's location names. This is aimed to be resolved in a future patch.

entry.title: Cursed Words v0.3.0
entry.content:
## Information This archipelago implementation is in **early development** and is in public pre-release for testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.
## Setup Guide Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.
## Issue / Bug Reporting If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)
## Release Notes This release provides the following updates: ### Client - Updated to support the changes made in the APWorld. ### APWorld - Complete re-work of Sticker and Stamp items - A majority of stickers and stamps are available as items, some are not yet supported but will be introduced in a future update. - Re-work of regions and access rules for logic balancing - Some location names adjusted - 'Scaling' locations _(such as Money Earned / Word Score)_ have been expanded to make way for the increased item pool size. - YAML option included to toggle shuffling Sticker / Stamp Slots into the item pool. - YAML option included to toggle Boss-sanity _(Adds location checks for defeating each mini-boss)_

entry.title: Arkham Horror The Card Game v0.1.4
entry.content: Change how items are disambiguated between campaigns and only include the disambiguation if required Added more locations to Wages of Sin Couple bugfixes

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.8
entry.content: - Trigger for `Open the Archipelago Shop` is easier to use - Additional safety checks before Knuckle Crack trap triggers - Archipelago Logs will no longer printout in the bottom left covering the UI - Archipelago Logs are now visible to the host while the scoreboard is open. It will display 8 messages at a time. - Important connection information is now displayed via bold text printouts instead - New Map - Nacht der Untoten - Undone Music EE Check - Samantha's Lullaby Check - "I said we're CLOSED!" Achievement Check (Don't let zombies inside for 3 rounds)

entry.title: Shovel Knight Pocket Dungeon v0.3.0
entry.content:
# Shovel Knight Pocket Dungeon Archipelago v0.3.0
[Setup](https://github.com/Mitchell1711/Archipelago/blob/skpd_ap/worlds/pocket_dungeon/docs/setup_en.md) | [Mod Page](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3619001702)
### Changes - Added new options for customizing the camp shop prices: "Chester Camp Shop Starting Price" and "Chester Camp Shop Price Modifier" - Improved generation speeds by using logic mixin for relic logic and enums for item & location categories - Choosing an excluded character as the starting character now rerolls your starting character instead of throwing an OptionError - The game no longer auto launches on connect - Chat messages are now prefixed with the name of the slot who sent the chat message - Updated setup and added some more console messages to make issues easier to resolve (hopefully)

entry.title: Black Market of Bulletphilia ~ 100th Black Market v0.4.2
entry.content:
Archipelago Randomizer implementation for **_Black Market of Bulletphilia ~ 100th Black Market_**, also known as _**Touhou 18.5**_.
- **.apworld version:** Unstable 0.4.2 - **Minimum Archipelago Launcher version:** 0.6.7
Recommended to play on Windows, as **the game does not support Linux natively**. If playing on Linux, it is recommended to run both Archipelago Launcher and the game in Wine/Proton.
# Changelog - Fixed client not remembering custom save data paths for the game. - Fixed a client bug that caused errors when playing Challenge Market. - Fixed client not loading previous play data properly. - Made slight generation logic adjustments to better reflect game logic. - Updated Komachi's Ability Card's name to a more accurate translation: "Haste Makes You Cross the Sanzu". - Added items **+8000 Funds** and **+8000 Bullet Money**. This will not negatively impact worlds generated before this update. - Added **Anti-Grinding Item Placements** option, which forces chosen items to appear early during runs. The items in question include: Kiketsu Matriarch's Threat, Princess Kaguya's Secret Stash, Pristine Self-Confidence, Hundredth Black Market, and +1000 Funds. Requires enabling **Anti-Grinding Item Toggle**. - Added `/toggle_debug` client command to toggle debug alerts. Not recommended unless used for debugging purposes.
Incompatible with worlds generated before 0.4.0. Compatible with worlds generated from 0.4.0 onwards.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/compare/unstable-0.4.1...unstable-0.4.2
# Game Details and Setup - See **game details** [here](https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/th185/docs/en_100th%20Black%20Market.md). When exporting .yaml files for this game, it is recommended to use the Options Creator in the Archipelago Launcher for a smooth experience. - See the **setup guide** [here](https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/th185/docs/setup_en.md).

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.18r2r2
entry.content:
- Fixed bug where the Gazette was prioritizing entrances using the wrong name, so priority was broken - Ported all changes from [7.4.25](https://github.com/agilbert1412/StardewArchipelago/releases/tag/7.4.25) - Fixed an issue where mines fish accidentally kept their mines conditions when trying to spawn outside - Fixed an issue where the vanilla data for legendary fish seasons is very wrong and was making its way to the spawn data - Fixed warping to the desert from some origins would not activate the desert festival properly
## 8.0.20-b - Fixed a minor screw up with NPC arrivals

entry.title: Xenoblade X v0.2.0
entry.content: - Added full Logic for Important Items and properly removed the available ways to obtain them ingame. - Added the new Option `Logic Levels`, which allows you to split up the logic of the game more, corresponding to your level. - Added improved Error Handling to make troubleshooting easier. This includes connection issues, unsupported game version and crashes. - Improved the docs with multiple new sections. - Restructured logic for Chapter 12. - Removed the skells one would get during `The Skell License` or `A Girl's Wings` - Made Shop Items that would be bought for quests unsellable. - Skell `Overdrive` now properly requires the same item. - Restored the default weapons for skells. - Fixed `Blade Lvl Basics` being unaffected by the `Blade License` - Fixed items being sent again after equipping them. - Fixed Important Items being unable to be sent more than once. - Fixed broken cemu settings not being applied from the client. - Fixed death link option propagation. - Fixed drifter class reequip of the two default arts when changing class. - Fixed some enemies not properly checking the location. - Fixed game crashes related to releases. - Improved the region squishing.

entry.title: Crash Team Racing v0.1.1
entry.content:
## CTR-AP v0.1.1 - fixes from the wild, DeathLink, one-lap cups
The first patch release, built almost entirely from player reports on v0.1.0. Thank you Bethany, Anezia, kabarakh, and Spark for the excellent bug reports.
📖 **New here? Follow the [setup guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md).**
**Update both halves together: this client and the v0.1.1 `ctr.apworld` are a pair.** Seeds generated with the new apworld need this client (they carry a newer settings format the old client does not know). Old v0.1.0 seeds keep working on this client unchanged.
### Fixed
- The black screen freeze after finishing your goal with all 18 Sapphire Relics received. The credits now always return you to the hub in Archipelago seeds. (#2, #38) - The rare crash when driving through a hub door while the Aku Aku hint for a newly opened area was playing. (#17, #37) - Winning a Gem Cup entered from another hub no longer strands you outside a locked Gemstone Valley: the podium ceremony now plays in the hub you entered from. (#34, #36) - The Purple Gem Cup check could fail to send if you had already received gem items from the multiworld. Gem cup wins now always send their check. (#35, #36) - The pause screen gem display now lights exactly the gem colours you have received, instead of a colour-blind count. (#35, #36) - Warp pad token requirements now show the actual required token colour and count. An "any colour" requirement cycles through all five colours. (#19, #20) - The relic trial target time now starts at the highest tier you can still earn on that track and steps down live when the clock passes it, instead of always showing the Platinum time. (#21, #22) - The Linux / Steam Deck build no longer crashes with "Illegal instruction" during the intro. (#3, #30) - Debug numpad keys are disabled by default in release builds. Typing your port number with NumLock on can no longer arm test machinery. (#16, #18) - Phantom race log lines during hub loads are gone. (#4, #25)
### New
- **DeathLink.** Off by default. Two send modes: `mask_reset` sends a death only on a full wipeout (fell off, eaten), `any_hit` also sends on every hit that lands on you. Receiving a death always forces the full mask-carry reset. A `deathlink_amnesty` option sends one death per N eligible deaths for the high-cadence mode. (#6, #39, dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld#5) - **One-lap cup races** (a community idea, spotted in hypnoshark's Twitch chat). A quality-of-life YAML option: all cup races run a single lap, in adventure and arcade. Off by default. Bonus worth knowing: cup legs also award that track's position checks, so an early cup can hand you several extra locations. Logic does not rely on this yet; that lands in v0.2.0. (#7, #31, dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld#3) - **Received Wumpa Fruit is real fruit.** Wumpa Fruit filler items now grant actual fruit to your kart at the next race's start (or live, mid-race). (#11, #26) - **Oxide's Final Challenge unlock rework.** The unlock is now a mode (`sapphire_relics`, `gold_relics`, `platinum_relics`, `any_relic_type`, `total_relics`) plus a relic count (1 to 18). The in-game door and the generator logic now agree in every mode. (#23, #32, dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld#2) - **Your goal location no longer hides progression.** When a location is your seed's goal, it is generated as filler-only, so nothing another player needs sits behind your final challenge. (#27, dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld#4) - **Out-of-date client banner.** If a seed was generated with a newer apworld than this client understands, the hub shows a persistent red warning instead of quietly misbehaving. This protects every future upgrade. (#8, #32)
### Breaking change for existing YAMLs
The old `oxide_final_challenge_unlock: 18_gold_and_platinum_relics` value is removed (it never worked as documented; that was the bug). A YAML carrying it fails generation with Archipelago's standard invalid-option error. Regenerate your YAML from the new template, or replace the value with one of the new modes. The default (`18_sapphire_relics` behaviour) is unchanged and old YAMLs using the default keep working.
### What is in this release
- `ctr_native_ap.exe`: the game executable with Archipelago support built in. - `ctr.apworld`: the Archipelago world, for whoever generates the multiworld. - `extract_assets.py`: the optional space-saving asset extractor. - `ap-config.example.txt`: a documented template for your server settings (optional; the in-game OPTIONS → Connection screen is the recommended way). - `SETUP.md`: step-by-step setup (the [living guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md), or [as shipped with this release](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/v0.1.1/SETUP.md)).
The `ctr.apworld` is also attached separately for multiworld hosts who only need the world file.
### Known limitations
- NTSC-U (North American) discs only. PAL and Japanese discs are detected and refused. - The disc image must be a raw MODE2/2352 dump (a `.cue`/`.bin`, a raw `.bin`, or a `.chd`). A cooked 2048-byte `.iso` does not carry the audio and video sector data the game needs. - `.chd` images require the `chdman` tool to be installed and on your PATH. - On reconnect the server replays your item history, so previously received Wumpa Fruit re-banks (capped at 10, cleared each race). Harmless, noted for transparency. - The Linux / Steam Deck build is attached as an EXPERIMENTAL asset for testing: 32-bit binary, needs glibc 2.38 or newer (SteamOS is fine). Known rough edges on Linux: the intro video glitches, the announcer voice is silent, and the track fly-by intro does not load. Self-build instructions live in BUILDING.md.
### What's next
The headline for v0.2.0 is the big one promised on release day: live position checks (earn checks for reaching and holding positions mid-race, including inside Gem Cups) as the foundation for progressive boost and character-stat item packs, with a proper difficulty dial on top. Also queued: Universal Tracker support, removing option-excluded locations from seeds entirely, and surface-comfort items. No dates promised, hobby project honesty applies.
Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue.
### Verify your download
`ctr-archipelago-v0.1.1-windows-x86.zip` SHA-256: `5e9f629f9d1a2469682cef38e27b9dd86024ef2f1b59da61231bf88b91693816`
`ctr-archipelago-v0.1.1-linux-x86.tar.gz` (experimental) SHA-256: `70970a3581a7e65b6723a58ff8883392967fb354da672ae597df777ca21ff97d`
### Credits
- The CTR-tools [CTR-ModSDK](https://github.com/CTR-tools/CTR-ModSDK) decompilation project, which this port is built on. - Reverse engineering and Archipelago work by Icebound777 and Taor - the [randomizer design](https://github.com/icebound777/CTR-Randomizer-Standalone) this project carries forward. - Bethany, Anezia, kabarakh, and Spark for the v0.1.0 field reports that shaped this release. - [PsyCross](https://github.com/OpenDriver2/PsyCross), for PlayStation hardware-abstraction code that parts of the native platform layer are derived from. - [thecodingbob](https://github.com/thecodingbob/ctr-native), whose in-game config menu framework this fork's options menu is ported from. - [SDL3](https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL), for cross-platform windowing, input, timing, and audio. - [apclientpp](https://github.com/black-sliver/apclientpp), the Archipelago client library powering the in-process connection. - Crash Team Racing is a trademark of its respective rights holders. This is an unofficial, fan-made project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by them.
### AI disclosure
Parts of this project were developed with AI assistance. See the [AI disclosure in the repository README](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap#ai-usage-disclosure) for the honest, detailed version.

entry.title: Mario Kart Wii v0.2.3
entry.content:
## Release Version 0.2.3: Multiple Fixes Got a log of reports that victory trophies were being assigned when they shouldn't be. This has been fixed and while I was at it I also fixed some other stuff.
### Changelog: - Fixed victory trophy count not being reset upon reconnect. - Fixed tracker SSL connection issues. - Fixed logging only partly showing up in the cmd window. - Fixed unlock-block patch message spam. - Added a small visual to the tracker to be able to track your victory trophies. - Updated some documentation :) .
**REQUIRES APWORLD VERSION 0.2.0 - 0.2.3**
_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.2.2...v0.2.3

entry.title: Another Crab's Treasure v0.5.1
entry.content:
**NOTE: NG+ features are still not functioning properly, and not recommended to be enabled at this time. Everything else with this update should now be functioning properly however. This update does not update the apworld, so you can update from v0.5.0 mid run.**
- Added an extra check to potentially fix Perfect Whorl not appearing at the end of the run with Shell Rando on (unable to recreate it fully, so please report if this continues happening) - Reduced the size of all map icons by 50% for easier readability on the map and world - Fixed in world item icons randomly disabling and not re-enabling properly (many issues with enemy aggro have been fixed) - Added options to toggle how far away world item icons appear in your view, as well as an option to change if they appear/disappear when aggro'd by an enemy - Changed Bobbit Worms to not be counted for the aggro check - Added an option to toggle DeathLink. - Changed the Archipelago connection flow to block connections to apworlds older than v0.5.0, to prevent bugs that come from that - Added the plugin version to the Archipelago window

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.21
entry.content:
## Mod - Fixed the bear cutscene again (apparently I keep breaking it?) - Adjusted the player color algorithm because Honeywell kept shaming me for being too dark :( - Fixed an issue with Desert Festival purchases costing both calico eggs and their DR currency - Increased the trap dequeuing timer so traps tend to less overwrite each other
## Apworld - Fixed the dwarf being meetable without the translation guide - Fixed mushroom kebab asking for the wrong mushroom (apparently distant lands had an update that changed it...) - Require both Marnie and Ayeisha for the pet cutscene, apparently it needs both of them to exist when Ayeisha is installed

entry.title: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes v0.3.0
entry.content:
Changelog:
- Added Deathlink - Added Modded Modules support - This includes all modules up to Praetorian that have their ruleseed randomized - These are used with the new adventure mode that is called "Praetorian Pact" - Added a green outline for modules that were obtained on the in-game tracker page - Added new item to filler called "Empty Manual Page" that is completely useless - Fixed the connection problem with "steamapps" folder duplication - Fixed "Default Text" appearing for objects with 2 classifications - Fixed "archipelago.json" not found that would have broken the APWorld with AP 0.7.0 - Changed colors in-game so that the used blue is more distinct from the black - Changed "Strike+" items to be considered useful instead of fillers
Manuals can be found [here](https://github.com/GreenPower713/KTaNE-Archipelago-Expert-Manuals/releases)
[Information Page](https://github.com/GreenPower713/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/ktane/docs/en_Keep%20Talking%20and%20Nobody%20Explodes.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/GreenPower713/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/ktane/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.11r2
entry.content:
Various bugfixes
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIII-2 v0.1.0
entry.content:
Initial public release of FF13-2 apworld!
Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks
To receive items from the client, hold L2 or R2 while in a field area (not the crux/battle)

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.8.1
entry.content:
Bug fixes on top of 0.8.1
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1

entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.4.1
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.4.1 [Beta]
The UT and Skill Update hotfix.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
This update must be installed on the host. The client can have 0.4.0 or 0.4.1 installed.
Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.4.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.4.0).
## Fixes
- Fixed an oversight causing generation failure during the calculate playthrough step with some settings

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16910079
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision fixed the missing parry requirement for the top grade rule for Forest Follies when hard logic is on.

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.6
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md) ## No Chapter 5 yet, Sorry!!
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta, the Ch1+2 Demo, or Chapter 5 versions will not work.)
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended for right now as the rewrite wasn't made with it in mind. This will be fixed sometime!**
# Changelog ## Game - Hopefully fixed crashing if you have too many players in your multiworld - Going above max hp will now set you back to max hp ### Chapter 3 - Attempted fix to a softlock when you received an item during a board minigame ### Chapter 4 - Fixed a crash if you tried to fight Hammer of Justice after skipping dark sanctuary - Fixed not being able to get Jackenstein's Gift if you forgor to talk to him
## Known Issues: - oops darker candy is accidentally named dark candy in chapter 4 when checking your inventory

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.8.2
entry.content:
Fix bug with overweight sounding rockets being allowed in logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2

entry.title: Factorio - Space Age Without Space v0.9.3
entry.content:
## 0.9.3 * Fixed a cross-slot bug involving custom recipes that use fluoroketone. * Added a better error message for impossible yaml combinations. * Put basic seed info into the Mod info * Added Integrated UT support to the client
## 0.9.2 * Made Energy Bridge recipe actually random * Made fish immune to lightning strikes. * Adjusted recipe costs to be more accurate, which should lead to more interesting seeds. * Fixed CLI not working. * Updated the way the mod handles text localisation.
## 0.9.1 * Science Packs are now given randomised names. * Changed the 'Vanilla' yellow science pack to be crafted in a centrifuge, then added it to the machine shuffle. * Fixed a bug with Universal Tracker compatibility. * Made fruit trees immune to lightning strikes.

entry.title: Another Crab's Treasure v0.5.2
entry.content:
**NOTE: NG+ features are still not functioning properly, and not recommended to be enabled at this time. Everything else with this update should now be functioning properly however. This update does not update the apworld, so you can update from v0.5.0 mid run. Downpatching is not required for this update, and is fully compatible with Year of the Crab update.**
- Improved world item markers to stay toggled on hopefully for good, and be significantly better on in game performance - Added an option to toggle the visibility of crystal item markers both in the map/world - Changed the top left in game settings to be stored in the save file, keeping your set settings across restarts - Added config options to the mod to keep track of the last used connection - Changed world/map item markers to not display collected items/checks that have been sent already - Changed the marker render distance slider bar to uncap the render distance if set all the way to the right (this will make it work as it did pre v0.5.1, minus the bugs) - Added a disconnect button to the connection menu after connecting - Fixed the pawn shop shopkeeper not being interactable in some situations, making it impossible to sell your trash for microplastics.

entry.title: TUNIC v5.0.1
entry.content:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: - Single Player: ❌ - Archipelago: ✅ - The tunic apworld was updated in this version: - Fixed inconsistent rules for boss checks if shuffled enemy drops and combat logic were both enabled
# Changes - Fixed a single player bug where switching from an entrance rando save file to a non-entrance rando save file in the same session would cause seed bleed and corrupt the item placements. - Fixed a visual bug when switching between save files that would cause the wrong freestanding item models/chest colors to appear on the first load. - Fixed a couple of Fox Prince logic bugs. - The Hero's Laurels are now prevented from appearing at the `Secret Gathering Place - 20 Fairies` check in Fox Prince due to it being too restrictive and causing issues. - The Dice and Dart items now appear in the inventory screen in Fox Prince. - Interacting with the Sealed Temple door will no longer send you to the intro cutscene ghost area. - This was previously always the case when playing Hexagon Quest, but now applies in all modes. - The seeking spell will no longer target the coin wells if the filter option for default checks is disabled. - To avoid confusion, the bald fox trap no longer removes the laurels from the player.

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16910335
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision adjust logic to allow double jumping for getting coin 1 in Funhouse Frazzle.

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.4
entry.content:
## Fixes to Mod
* Fixed an issue where, in the Quest Menu in Records, if a non-randomized quest was displayed after a randomized quest, their rewards would overlap (#87, @CodeTriangle). * Fixed an issue where, on the Archipelago Game Info screen, when Quest Randomization and Shop Randomization were both turned off, Progressive Equipment would never display as enabled. (#86, @CodeTriangle).
## Fixes to Logic
* **Creator** goal has been moved to **Vermillion Wasteland** as it should have been (#82, @Gudf). * **Shock Pedestal** and **So'najiz Circuit Override** have swapped regions as their logic had previously been transposed (#84, @kumquat-ir). * **An Unfortunate Series of Features** now requires access to Maroon Valley (#85, @CodeTriangle). * **Botanics: Omega Open Baraleles** now requires grove or wave (#85, @CodeTriangle). * Shop Slots for **Cross Gear** in **Rhombus Weapons** now requires **Azure Archipelago Pass** (#85, @CodeTriangle).

entry.title: Spirit Valley v2.1.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld) Redid rules to use Rule Builder allowing for "/explain" to be used in UT - (APworld) Fixed main/side mission battles being in logic when the associated mission isn't - (Client) fixed sending goal locations when server has client release disabled
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
CLIENT: - Have Spirit Valley Installed - Download Spirit Valley Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Spirit Valley Archipelago Client V#.#.#.zip" to the directory where "SpiritValley.exe" is
APWORLD (needed for generating archieplago game): - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Spirit Valley APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Spirit Valley APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recommended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default spirit valley YMAL

entry.title: Zelda's Adventure GDX v0.1.0r2r2
entry.content:
## What's Changed * fix(ap) sync the inventory after initially loading a save by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/105 * fix(ap) remove double connect initialization to let the game disconnect properly by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/106 * feat(zelda) rework pushback negation, zelda can always walk off screens now by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/107 * fix(npc) make voice lines pause instead of stop to avoid skipping by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/108
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.3

entry.title: Brutal Orchestra v1.0.0r2r2
entry.content:
New fetures 1) Text Client in a game 2) Fixed item (Not all) 3) Deathlink implemented
Not sure if there are issues except some items. But feel free to type in thread or DM

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIII-2 v0.1.1
entry.content:
Fixes: Correct issue when generating a room with multiple FF13-2 players contained within.
Other: Improve/fill out setup guide
Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks

entry.title: Pokemon FireRed and LeafGreen Prelease v1.0.1
entry.content:
ROM CHECKSUM: `6DEAB618`
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/vyneras/Archipelago/blob/1.1.0-beta.2/worlds/pokemon_frlg_prerelease/docs/setup_en.md) [Rom Changes](https://github.com/vyneras/Archipelago/blob/1.1.0-beta.2/worlds/pokemon_frlg_prerelease/docs/rom%20changes.md)
**Apworld Updates** - Updated client to support full Entrance Rando tracking in PopTracker - New option `item_appearance_matches_contents` - Changes the color of item balls to match their contents. Green balls contain progression items, blue balls contain useful items, and red balls contain filler or trap items
**Known Issues** - The `base_stats` option does not affect Deoxys attack/defense forms - The Rival battle in Oak's Lab can occasionally softlock the game. Recommend saving before triggering the battle

entry.title: Universal Tracker v0.3.1
entry.content:
* Fixed addons being runnable during race mode * added docs for addons
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/compare/Tracker_v0.3.0...Tracker_v0.3.1

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.8.3
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.8.2...v0.8.3

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.3
entry.content:
### apworld changes - Added trap item options. #11 @ItzLoonie - Renamed all Block 1-Up location checks to have the word "Block" in the name. - Cool, Cool Mountain - Slide Shortcut Second 1-Up is only created when No Despawns is enabled, for now. - Logic fixes.
### sm64ex changes - Exit Course takes you out the entrance you took into the level. Exit to Lobby takes you to the castle entrance. - Bob-omb Buddies aren't forced to appear without the corresponding item when Buddy Checks is off.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - Binoculars are now in `gadgets_to_randomize` by design. No need to add them yourself, they'll show up every time! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight! - Randomized minigames now dance and play, gift rooms use keys to clear the way. - Named rats await with rewards to earn, return Santa's reindeer to Whoville's Mayor in turn! - Some locations now support sending checks one by one. No more missed checks, every single one gets done!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat! - Connecting once could make you repeat, your slot name twice to take your seat.

entry.title: YARG v0.0.24
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Teto Pack 2 Setlist
Changes: - Update YARN Request Pack 3
## What's Changed * Update YARN Request Pack 3 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/55 * Added Teto Pack 2 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/56
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.23...0.0.24
